problem id: 947c23f0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(2) AND NOT SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01000111 -> 00110011
  01000110 -> 01110111
  10000001 -> 10111011
  01010001 -> 11111111
  11011101 -> 11111111
  01100110 -> 11111111
  11100111 -> 10111011
  01101101 -> 00011011

query: 11001001
predicted answer: 10111011
